locations_inspected.name: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP
findings: Dry pipe sprinkler system, 20 years old, manufactured by Reliable, NFPA 13 compliant
6 control valves inspected — all found in open position
Sprinkler heads visual condition: Fair — minor corrosion observed
Spare heads in cabinet: Yes — adequate supply
deficiencies: Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Remove combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors to comply with NFPA clearance requirements
Remediate exposed wiring and install missing junction box covers in main electrical room to meet code requirements
Connect all tamper switches on control valves to supervisory signaling system

overall_assessment.summary: The dry pipe sprinkler system at 8117 Preston Road passed inspection with an overall system status of PASS. However, the property received a Below Average risk grade due to identified deficiencies including combustible storage impinging on sprinkler deflector clearances, electrical code violations in the main electrical room, and tamper switches not fully connected on control valves. Sprinkler heads show minor corrosion. Water supply is adequate.
